title: Business KPIs
description: Business metrics: recommendation throughput and latency, error rates by module, slow function tracking

panels.title: Recommendations Served per Minute
panels.query: SELECT rate(count(*), 1m) as rec_rate FROM "python-worker-metrics" WHERE metric_name = 'recommendations.served' AND timestamp > now() - 1h

panels.title: Recommendation Latency (p50 / p95)
panels.query: SELECT percentile(recommendation_duration_seconds, 0.50) as p50, percentile(recommendation_duration_seconds, 0.95) as p95 FROM "python-worker-metrics" WHERE timestamp > now() - 1h

panels.title: Top Recommendation Sources
panels.query: SELECT source, count(*) as served FROM "python-worker-metrics" WHERE metric_name = 'recommendations.served' AND timestamp > now() - 1h GROUP BY source ORDER BY served DESC

panels.title: Function Error Rate by Module
panels.query: SELECT module, rate(count(*), 5m) as error_rate FROM "python-worker-metrics" WHERE metric_name = 'function.errors' AND timestamp > now() - 1h GROUP BY module

panels.title: Slow Functions
panels.query: SELECT timestamp, service.name, module, function, duration_ms, threshold_ms FROM "python-worker-metrics" WHERE metric_name = 'function.threshold_exceeded' AND timestamp > now() - 6h ORDER BY timestamp DESC
